name: Narrow Clothing Rack with Shoe Shelf - Brightroom™
description:
Keep your clothes and footwear organized in one spot with the Narrow Clothing Rack with Shoe Shelf from Brightroom™. This black rack features a pyramid-like design, enough hanging space for your clothes, and a built-in shelf to organize your shoes. Made with a metal frame, this rack is a perfect home addition.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
